hotel_name: DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hotel Myrtle Beach Oceanfront

reviews.title: Just no
reviews.text: For 290 a night I would think This place would be up to date, the rooms are old. Looks like a motel for sure, for 290 I expected it to be nice like the Hilton or Marriott but this place sucks. I’m really disappointed. Book a king size bed and they gave me a queen size. I order a sofa bed with the room and when I opened it up, it was a stains all over it. The worst part it was stains all on the floor inside the bathrooms. This place needs a lotttttt of updating. The lobby and restaurant looks nothing like the rooms. Can’t have crappy rooms and everything else looks updated.
reviews.room_type: 1 Kg Bd Partl OceanVw Rm-Sleeper Sofa-Balcony

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Toilet was broken and it flooded our room. With not a lot of help for a long time.
reviews.negatives: Toilet was broken and it flooded our room. With not a lot of help for a long time.

reviews.title: Quick Getaway
reviews.text: The place shows its age, the room was clean but some of the areas on the property and elevators needed major maintenance.  The smell of marijuana was  throughout my building and on the property. Major turn off for me! I also didn’t realize they wouldn’t have places to rent or get chairs on the beach. That was different from other places I’ve stayed but the beach  was clean and relaxing.

reviews.title: I have to make very serious and remodelling in your place if you wanna customers
reviews.positives:
Stay avoid from this hotel! This hotel not worth a penny! 
Unless, of course, you've dreamed of sleeping on an airport runway for half your life.
From 7 a.m. onward, planes land right through the hotel, almost touching the roof, and then they take off right through you.
reviews.negatives:
We paid the refund in the lobby through booking.com. Upon arrival, they told us to pay, good luck! We checked the terminal, and it was double that. 1,604 for 3 days! 🤦🏻‍♀️

When we said that on Booking and the hotel it costs $342 per day, they replied that this couldn't be true, went to negotiate and wanted the full payment of $1,604, well, this hotel doesn't even cost $342 per day, the maximum for this hotel is $200 per day and that's even with the fact that there are no vacancies anywhere else

reviews.title: Awful
reviews.text: The room was dirty smell like old carpet need remodeling the hotel . you walk in the lobby it’s nice.

reviews.title: The hotel charged me over $500 more than booking .com quoted me. When I questioned the hotel they had no explanation. I
reviews.positives: The view was excellent.
reviews.negatives: Ocean front

reviews.title: Not 4 stars
reviews.text: The first room had a terrible chemical odor and was dirty.  The second room we moved to still had frayed old carpet and black mold in the shower.  Hard to believe the name Hilton is attached to this hotel... this existing for $300 for one night... in March.

reviews.title: Worst hotel experience at a double tree
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives: I did not enjoy anything about the property

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: I travelled from NYC 10 hours driving and we arrived 12pm and staff in the reception let us wait till 3:30pm I told them I have kids and they were very tired they said sorry check in 4 pm you have to wait whatever first time in my life hotel let me check in at this time and also it was half the hotel empty by logic check out 11 am how come check in 4pm after all that the beds and bellows are smells it was disgusting and merged with other hotel, the reception on other hotel I never had this experience, it’s impossible Double three by Hilton it’s fake.

reviews.title: Very disappointed. Would never visit again nor recommend .
reviews.negatives:
The kitchen was not equipped with kitchen utensils.
No carpet 
Very uncomfortable seating. Poor furniture .
Noise level in adjoining rooms was very annoying on both sides of our room. No sound barrier.

reviews.title: The room & price were not compatible
reviews.text: The room had broke chair, light switch hanging out of wall, and shower wall was not attached on the back side. Not to mention the toilet was loose when my wife set down on it. The maintenance came and repaired the toilet and replaced the chair. The price you pay for the room I got were not realistic.

reviews.title: Will not stay here again
reviews.positives: Close to the beach
reviews.negatives: Unconventional bathroom. Towels smelled bad. Refrigerator wasn’t working.

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.text: Good location. Renovations are currently in progress. What has been done so far is very nice. Quiet.
reviews.room_type: 1 Kg Bd Partl OceanVw Rm-Sleeper Sofa-Balcony

reviews.title: Very disappointed, different staff would tell us different things and nothing was open. Room floor was not cleaned.
reviews.positives: Nothing, very disappointed
reviews.negatives: Price, layout of property, not clean, no amenities open

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: The hotel is in a great spot on the beach but it is right at the end of the runway and you will hear planes take off and fly overhead all the time.  The beds are comfortable and the rooms are clean but the furnishings are a bit shabby. The sink is in the room instead of enclosed in the bathroom which is not my preference.  Staff were great!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Close to the ocean and pools were great
reviews.negatives: Poor service for the price you pay to stay there. Couldn't even get wash clothes or clean towels. When you asked for them the staff acted like you offended them. I wouldn't recommend this resort to anyone.

reviews.title: Great Location!
reviews.text: Awesome location, right on the beach! 13 min drive to Broadway at the beach. Plenty to do around.

reviews.title: miserable
reviews.positives: I love the beach, but I like to be oceanfront view only.
reviews.negatives: I didn't have oceanfront view.

reviews.title: Peace and Quiet
reviews.text: New renovations were great, location can’t be beat! Pricing this time of year is reasonable, summer months are astronomically high!

reviews.title: I will NEVER book for a 3rd party site such as booking again. They said this is a 4 star hotel and it was nothing more t
reviews.positives: Nothing, we purchased the non-refundable rate and leaned a lesson.
reviews.negatives: Everything. This is the worst hotel I’ve ever stayed in.

reviews.title: Short Stay Well Enjoyed
reviews.text: Next time I would definitely stay longer but it was well worth the money spent, clean ocean front room, convenient location, the staff is amazing, only thing was our room was not ready until after 5, an hour after we're to check in. No big deal though. Will definitely come back .

reviews.title: I will NOT ever stay at this Hilton ever again.
reviews.positives: Hotel was absolutely terrible. Definitely a 2 star hotel and not worth the money.
reviews.negatives: Everything. They need to tell people it’s under construction. Half of the hotel closed off due to construction. Bathrooms are so so SMALL.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: I reserved an oceanfront view. I was given a room that had a direct view of a huge pit of dirt and the indoor swimming pool that was under construction. If you looked to the left you would see a partial view of the ocean. When I called to complain about it I was told that my request for a different room could not be accommodated and I had to find another room at almost 9pm.

reviews.title: Worst experience ever
reviews.positives: Nothing worse hotel experience I ever had
reviews.negatives: The receptionist put me in a room where they were tearing up the pool...so sad and other rooms were available for this hotel.

reviews.title: Not acceptable. Unwilling to fix.
reviews.positives: Hotel in disrepair……unwilling to correct issues.
reviews.negatives:
Phone didn’t work.
Bad plumbing….. noisy in the night , all night.
Not clean.

reviews.title: Nightmare
reviews.positives: We didn’t stay we got there and walked right back out. The smell of dampness was overwhelming! The walls were dirty, bathroom stunk, dark and dingy, noisy, definitely was not a balcony ! It was horrible ruined our trip! We drove around for an hour to find another room. They said they credit us back , when we got home it was only one room, now we need the other night taken off!!!!
reviews.negatives: Cleaner

reviews.title: Read above
reviews.positives: The guy running the front desk was professional
reviews.negatives: First off, we got a room and the toilet was clogged. They called someone to fix it and they never came. So we switched rooms. Then come to find out the next morning I go to take a shower and the shower halfway works. I pull the valve up and water was coming out the shower head and the faucet. Water was barely warm. You need binoculars to see the ocean. Even though it’s advertised as “ocean view” I will never stay here again. It was a rip off for $340 for one night.

reviews.title: When I got into the room immediately you see the refrigerator leaking the room smells of smoke and you see that the comf
reviews.positives: The location and staff was the only thing good about this hotel .
reviews.negatives:
The hotel was dirty 
It’s old and run down needs upkeep and painting and mold removed .

reviews.title: we left one day before
reviews.positives: location & nice staff
reviews.negatives: dirty, expensive for what it was, trash on the floors, smelly elevators. Also at 10:30 pm someone knocked our door, we didn’t answered, someone said ‘house keeping’ and opened the door with a key. We closed the door and said ‘no, tomorrow please’ and at the next day we asked in the lobby if there was house keeping at that hour (and we told the situation) and they said that house keeping is between 10 am to 6 pm. And you need to scheduled, so someone who weren’t ‘housekeeping’ had our room key and try to enter.

reviews.title: Bad experience to stay there
reviews.positives: None
reviews.negatives: Dirty rooms, room without bath tub incredible!!!, bad service, smell so bad, old stuffs, bugs in the bedrooms, no recommended

reviews.title: I was misled and cheated out of my money., Terrible stay
reviews.positives: The only part of the hotel that I liked was the front lobby
reviews.negatives:
The hotel is very outdated! Rooms were on the outside like a motel. I paid for partial ocean view but I also had a view of everybody else’s balcony. The rooms were dusty and the bathrooms had chipping paint and parts of the wall were water damaged. 
Parking was a complete joke! I had to park on the street because the parking lot/deck was completely full each night. I will never stay here again! Terrible property!

reviews.title: Staff is great, place is disgusting would never stay here again
reviews.positives: The pier, and the lobby area
reviews.negatives: Everything else is old, dirty, bugs everywhere, pools disgusting

reviews.title: Not goo and I won’t be back
reviews.positives: Nothing not clean at all. Filthy pools area.
reviews.negatives: Everything with the exception of the lady at the desk that was accommodating after waiting 3 1/2 hours beyond check in time to get a filthy room

reviews.title: View great make sure you put people with no pets next to a quiet room and not near family
reviews.positives: Loved th3 view
reviews.negatives: Had a barking dog next door could not sleep good

reviews.title: Little fun for lots of money
reviews.positives: Lots to do for grown ups and kids
reviews.negatives: Roaches, cost for what you get, breakfast staff was rude

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.positives: The location was good since it is a true oceanfront property.
reviews.negatives: Upon arrival we saw our sheets were dirty and it took 3 calls and 2 hours for the housekeeping to change them.

reviews.title: Staff was great I felt for the price it should have been better way over priced they need to do some up keeps we were in
reviews.positives: Location  and close to dog park
reviews.negatives:
Elevators was horrible couple got stuck on one for 30 min 
The commode ran continuously after calling to get them to fix it 
And the person below us smoked pot the whole time we couldn't use the backony

reviews.title: Nice introduction, beautiful views, HORRIBLE experience.
reviews.positives: The only interaction that went well was the first interaction with the lady at the front left desk around 1pm 7/20/24. The rest of the staff were very rude and impatient. The location was decent in regards oceanfront, but horrible for family with kids having to go back and forth between buildings for the front desk, which was needed more times than necessary during a hotel visit here.
reviews.negatives: Horrible staff. I didn’t like how the staff spoke in person nor over the phone. They were rude and impatient. Requested towels twice and did not get them either time until I went and personally grabbed some. The issue with CrowdStrike apparently affected the hotel and my key and lock would not work. I have a wife and 2 kids and an infant with us, and it is obviously very hot on the beach. It was a huge inconvenience to keep waiting at our door over 15 minutes each time, and waiting for maintenance and then having to walk a 8-10 minute round trip to the front desk to “have new keys made” — which ended up not working either. This occurred over 6 times. And I stated to them early on that I have a heart condition. They did not move us or refund me. They wouldn’t even give me a late checkout after all the time they stole from me waiting to get into our room. Very uncomfortable and inconvenient experience.

reviews.title: Absolutely horrible
reviews.positives: I liked the willingness and helpfulness from staff and that's was all
reviews.negatives: We got to the hotel it was super sketchy we drove to what looked like the front it was poorly lit no staff in sight we spent an hour walking around for someone and finally found a conference center and asked a man who finally helped point us across the street? To where the check in was. Now we are tired as we just did a 15 hour drive down to the hotel... We go up and it looks like a horror movie the lights were non existent, vacant rooms looked like they had been demolished, but we ignored it because of construction... as we walked in our room there were papers on the floor, stains on the pillows, the main light was broken and even the toilet paper holder was broken. We promptly left and stayed for all of about 10 seconds in the room before we went back and tried to get out refund. The company refuses to give a refund after I was promised one. Absolutely terrible

reviews.title: NOT the trip I had planned for or envisioned!
reviews.positives: Close to the ocean
reviews.negatives:
Construction and noise. Check in took 45 minutes due to person checking us in. This man was totally confusing and putting charges on my card got it declined when I was actually trying to pay with cash. Had to call the bank to get it straightened out!
Was on the first floor with dog and handicapped husband. Was ridiculous trying to walk so far to elevator and get downstairs. Family was split up on 2 different floors. I had made the request to all be together as much as possible.

reviews.title: Not worth the price!!
reviews.positives: Being located on the beach however it was not walking distance from the strip and all the entertainment
reviews.negatives: Hotel very out dated, dirty carpet, bathroom not cleaned properly, and had a old musty smell. Also sink in the room next to the bed was a terrible idea. They also tried to charge us again for a resort fee even though we paid it with booking but once I showed them they did not after several min of discussion. Did not post that parking was $12 a day.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives: Bathroom and balcony door and carpet

reviews.title: Crap
reviews.positives: Oceanfront location and being able to the use Ellie pool was the best part of this hotel.
reviews.negatives: Dingy hotel, pools not clean, no clean towels at the pool, trash all over the place. I don’t think we ever saw a person working there. The room was fine, very small and was not impressed by the cleanliness. Price for the room was insane. I expected much more for such an expensive oceanfront room. Thin walls could hear people at 3 AM coming home from a night out. Overall, I was glad we were only staying overnight. Will not be staying at a doubletree again.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
they never cleaned our room- the stairwells are dirty and scary need open steps. No access from rooms to lobby .
Hotel is nice- staff in dining is nice- but reception and check in terrible-

reviews.title: It was ok. Need more umbrellas
reviews.positives: Clean
reviews.negatives: Pools not up to par

reviews.title: Terrible hotel! Save your money!
reviews.positives: It was close to the water and activities.
reviews.negatives: Some of the staff was not pleasant. The beds were extremely uncomfortable. The room we were first given the AC didn't work right, no curtains in the living room and no phone in the room also the crib we reserved was not in the room. After they finally gave us a new room there was dog pee on the floor and the bathroom was dirty also no lights or lamp in the living room. The staff didn't even seem to care that we were not happy. The restaurant in the hotel was not good either food was awful felt like I was eating highschool cafeteria food. Will never stay there again!

reviews.title: Not staying there again
reviews.positives: Room was ok.
reviews.negatives: Hotel under construction, I was not notified. Hotel overpriced   Room service was extremely overpriced. Only one place was open for food and not attached to hotel.  Although location was oceanfront it was far from most things to do.   Definitely NOT worth the money

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: I didn’t like the fact that my girlfriend’s IPAD was stolen out of the room we stayed in.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Loudness of shower poor plumbing

reviews.title: Never again!
reviews.positives: Location to airport
reviews.negatives: Long walk to my room after mid night. Not well lit. Room has stains on carpet smelled moldy and sheets and towels felt damp. It was awful and not worth 300 a night?!?  It was a dump. Felt more like a motel!

reviews.title: Not what I expected
reviews.positives: I had ocean view
reviews.negatives:
The room smells like dog there were dog hair on the seat and a cockroach on the wall.
If I would of known it was like that I would of never got the room I had hi expectations and didn't meet half

reviews.title: The hotel was nice a little dated which would have been fine if they had staff to attend to guests
reviews.positives: Location was good. Beach was great. Restaurant had decent food. That’s about it for this hotel.
reviews.negatives:
They gave me the wrong room at first. It was supposed to be a handicap accessible room. I had to wait 2 hours for the room I ordered to be ready. Check in is at 4. Didn’t get my room until 6:30. Could not get room service even after requesting it 24 hours in advance. Had to request my bottled water each day and we still didn’t get it on some days. The comforter on the bed was FILTHY which I realized after the first night. 
Returned to my room after being out for 8 hours to find no clean towels after requesting towels. Pools were a little dirty and the only available chairs to sit on in the shade had debris from the trees. Same debris for 5 days. Parking was scarce had to park on the street for 3 nights.

reviews.title: Perfect location horrible accommodations
reviews.positives: The location was great.  The balcony had a nice view of the ocean.  The staff was great..
reviews.negatives: The refrigerator wasn’t working, and the microwave was severely rusted.  I felt it was unsafe to use..  I was told someone would be up to fix it however no one came.  I had to call again the next day to get the items replace & fixed.   The refrigerator never got cold &  my food went bad. The carpet was disgusting.. it had several stains & it was filthy.

reviews.title: I paid for the hotel so I had to stay there.
reviews.positives: View
reviews.negatives: Very dirty

reviews.title: Will not be going back to this resort.
reviews.positives: Location is great for going to the beach, the room was clean and well maintained.
reviews.negatives: Hard to navigate, front desk was rude and vending machines were broken, late check in, after pre registration 4 hours prior. Parking was hard to find and the ocean view should be be renamed to obstructed view since I had a better view of the neighboring rooms balcony. When I addressed my concerns with the resort rep at the front desk, he could care less and offered no solution.

reviews.title: It was okay.
reviews.positives: It was on the beach.
reviews.negatives: Parking was terrible. There were gnats in my room. I definitely don’t feel like it was worth what I paid.

reviews.title: Beliw average stay
reviews.positives: Being along the ocean and being able to see it from the room balacony.
reviews.negatives: Very much less than average for a 4 star hotel. Couch in room dirty and furniture old - worn, stain chipped fading! No room service available. Food in restaurant expensive for being average in taste and presentation. Charged for resort fees x 2 for items never used and only there for actually 1 full day! Fees removed but not refunded to my debit card as yet.

reviews.title: probably won’t return
reviews.positives: easy acess to room from parking lot
reviews.negatives: price and hidden charges

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The air conditioner was great but a little noisy and the bed was comfortable
reviews.negatives:
We had problems with the key to the front door
 We had maintenance come every day to open it and the back door twice.

reviews.title: Too much room access.
reviews.positives: The view
reviews.negatives: Water pressure, rooms need an upgrade. Too many pizza menus placed in our door.

reviews.title: Unfortunately no good.
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Mattress, furniture old and dingy, needs a full upgrade.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Ocean front
reviews.negatives: The resort was way over priced

reviews.title: Poor facilities but friendly staff
reviews.positives: Location is very good and easy access to the beach and the fishing pier, as well as most the areas restaurants and parks.
reviews.negatives: Booking.com and the hotel website didn’t mention at all that more than half of the property is under renovation, the remaining operational section is essentially next to a construction site. The facility in the room is old and malfunctioning all the time. During our stay my daughter was locked inside the bathroom for about an hour and the staff have to break the door to get her out. Very scary experience for her as the bathroom is very small and tight in air.

reviews.title: Will chose a better hotel next time.
reviews.positives: The only thing was okay was the included mini-golf.
reviews.negatives: I didn't like how the hotel looked. It's under remodel and that wasn't express when booking. The hotel looked awful. It was over priced and we only got partial ocean view. The other things that were included in the resort fee were not available other then mini-golf. The mini-golf area wasn't well taken care of either. On top of that they charge a $75 dollar fee for having pets that wasn't disclosed when you went to book the stay. This is not a place that I will stay at again. For one night I paid over $200 hundred dollars and it wasn't even worth it. This should have been more like $50 dollars for the night. There are better hotels for the cost. The pictures on here is not how the hotel looks like. If you are looking for a place to stay at, chose a different hotel.

reviews.title: Don't judge a book by the cover.
reviews.negatives: Difficult to locate. Wasn't accommodating to disabled. Everything was undergoing construction. Wasn't informed ahead of time about the construction. We heard every airplane coming into the airport.

reviews.title: The location is great. Value wasn’t there at all
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Lack of comfort in the beds , noise through the room’s door and walls, lack of cleanliness on countertops and cabinets.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The room is not very big. Called to ask for towels but no one brought them. The counter didn't say that if the room was to be cleaned, they had to be informed as well.

reviews.title: Won't be back , or stay at another hilton
reviews.positives: Didn't eat here
reviews.negatives: 2ice machines broken, door to room leaked water and air,     extra charges to park at hotel and destination charges

reviews.title: A lost chance,my family and friends love travel
reviews.positives: I came to Myrtle Beach, and got room with Booking.com, the room was ok, in pool area, pool Towels were unavailable,at breakfast I was charged for breakfast, but later, I sent this to booking.com and it taken care of, but at breakfast, Latino friend, was badly treated twice, at the 1st breakfast,for wanting fresh hot coffee,the next morning it took my friend a good deal of time to get his coffee,I'm LDS, I don't drink coffee or tea, but twice my friend was treated like he was not as important as others.The day my oldest sister wanted information for church group, and me to get her some information, I went to check in desk, and asked, I was told in a tone, I would have to talk to someone in sales,after breakfast and this, I lost my focus( I left my keys at the desk). I have worked in retail food management in 70s 80s and 90s, I worked 26 years at Dai Nippon ( IMSA) as a Production Supervisor, Quality and Customer Satisfaction is Absolute.This past April we were at The Embassy Suit, another sister,with my Great Great Nephew and Great Great Niece,I being a Cheap Republican, stayed in the Hampton next door to save money to be a very good Great Great Uncle
reviews.negatives: Please see the Above

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Location was excellent.
reviews.negatives: Property is very outdated and not worth the price.

reviews.title: It was ok and very expensive.
reviews.positives: Nice beach front location.
reviews.negatives:
Poor signage to get to building with the room from the check in lobby.
Charged $75 for "amenities" that were not specified. Including $15 for parking at checkout.
At check in was told there would be coffee in the lobby each morning. Went for coffee and was told coffee is only served on weekends.
This is not a hotel for business travelers. Too many costly add ons.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The breakfast was really good along with our waitress.
reviews.negatives: The heated pool temp was cold. But my biggest issue was being charged $19 a day to park when this was never mentioned  to me. That should have been included in the room cost.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The ocean view
reviews.negatives: The way the room looked, needs remolding

reviews.title: Not the best place we have ever stayed
reviews.positives: large room, coffee maker, fridge
reviews.negatives: requested and paid for an ocean front room, but was placed in a partial ocean view room

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Not really clean

reviews.title: You need English speaking staff. Our first day there there was a maid next door cleaning so we walked over to ask about
reviews.positives: I booked a room on the corner right on the beach and that’s not what we got. So dissatisfied we will never book to stay here again!! Terrible service !
reviews.negatives: We never received clean towels or toilet paper, I kept having to go to housekeeping and tell them what we needed. This was an every day thing.

reviews.title: My third visit might be my last.
reviews.positives:
The bed was super comfy 😌!
Short walk to the beach!
The shower has plenty of hot, powerful water!
reviews.negatives:
10 dollars for parking per day!
The price I was quoted online was about thirty dollars more when I received a receipt!
Found screws in the parking area that I was charged to park in!
Helicopter rides fly over continuously all day!
Something made our door pop at night, which made me nervous .

reviews.title: Location great! View terrible construction site outside your window
reviews.positives: Location was great
reviews.negatives: The room!! The room was clean but our view was terrible. When i checked in not once did the staff mention the ugly view of the construction outside of my window, when i asked for another room with a better view of the ocean the women was very rude in guest services she cut me off and said it’s nothing she can change and she hung up. I could tell the hotel was not sold out she just did not want to accommodate me any so for the price it was not worth it and the indoor pool was closed as well.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The location of the hotel is perfect.
reviews.negatives: The cleanliness of the room. The carpet had stains on it. Housekeeping tidied the room but left the trash outside the room. For the price we paid I was expecting a little more luxury. I guess we paid for the beach view which was priceless.

reviews.title: Had a good time family loved it all but the staff and the front desk
reviews.positives: Liked the hotel liked the location was not impressed with the staff
reviews.negatives: Had a lot of billing issue extended our stay paid cash they really had a hard time with that came to our room to tell us to check out 3 days early took 4 trips to desk to get it straightened out

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: It was clean for the most part there was some trash left in the room from prior vacationers, beds comfy,  friendly staff, size of room ok.
reviews.negatives: One day the power was shut down for almost 2 hours for emergency maintanence. Was not advise about it until the day of. The beach in August without AC HOT. I thought there was too many vagrants around the hotel. The price I paid for staying there was not worth the money. I have stayed at a lot better hotels for less especially at a resort beach town. When I arrived to my room there was trash left behind from previous occupants.

reviews.title: Insulting.
reviews.positives: I was supposed to get an ocean view but I got Trees and Pool view. For the price I paid I expected more. At first I couldn't find the hotel checkin area. I had to walk a lot to get to my room.
reviews.negatives: Staff was not very accommodating. When my credit card on file didn't work, although I already paid for my stay in full, they locked me out of the room. They had a security guard walk me to my room so I could my wallet to give them another credit card to have on file so they could allow me to have a key to my room. Horrible and insulting experience.

reviews.title: NOT worth the money
reviews.positives: Easy to get to the hotel.
reviews.negatives: The hotel needs a MAJOR updating to the whole hotel from rooms to hallways to elevators. Smell of mold in rooms

reviews.title: Even accounting for the location and time of year, it seemed a bit overpriced.
reviews.positives: Food was an excellent value.  Concierge was helpful.  Pools were great.
reviews.negatives: Hostesses at restaurant need people skill training and learn to communicate better.  Large pool never got towels on July 5th during peak day hours.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Old outdated

reviews.title: Just ok. Overpriced

reviews.title: Fantastic family summer spot
reviews.positives: Staff was very nice.  The room was clean and the bed was so comfortable.  We had dinner at the restaurant by registration.  They had the best clam chowder.  And the restaurant ocean front views were amazing.
reviews.negatives: We were there in January.  Lukewarm showers only.  The water does not get hot.  The ocean front view is obstructed by a large water slide.  The indoor pool is just enclosed with glass.  Perfect for summer if it rains .  We were not able to use any of the amenities And they don’t have off season pricing.  Definitely not a winter getaway spot.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Staff was great. Room was fine, but was a stretch to be ocean view.
reviews.negatives: Dogs in property barking most of the night.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: New building is nice, great restaurant, pool and nice staff
reviews.negatives: Bed was old, headboard had weird looking stains, mattress was bad, walls were super thin we could hear everything, airport proximity

reviews.title: It could have been better.
reviews.positives: The view was nice and the beach was easily accessible.
reviews.negatives: The bathroom was tiny you could barely open the door without having to hit the toilet not a lot of space or room to move around. The property was located next to an RV camping site and trailer park site you could hear the noise in the night coming from there direction. Someone had thrown up in one of the elevator and I called to report it so they could clean it up because anybody could step in it and the smell was bad . It took them a whole 24 hours  to get it cleaned . I have included the picture of the elevator in my review.

reviews.title: All in all it was a wonderful trip. Thank you for loving our fur baby!
reviews.positives: We loved the room and the view was amazing!
reviews.negatives: The fact that half of the hotel was under renovation so we missed out on a lot.

reviews.title: it was at the beach and I let the ocean calm me.
reviews.positives: location and the staff was nice.
reviews.negatives: when I booked room stated free breakfast but we had to pay. construction outside window was dislikeable. comfort on bed was so worn instead of fluffy it had hard balls of cotton. ice room smelled. we had no paper cups in room.one  elevator was down. this hotel bore the name Hilton which was one of the reasons I booked there.

reviews.title: Above average

reviews.negatives:
Water pressure in the sink was awful. Cracks in the shower and bathroom. Fridge froze everything we put in it. Phone didn't work in the room to call desk. 
Airport was close by (I didn't realize before booking) so it was SO loud all day.

reviews.title: Above average

Pools very dirty and completely lacking in serious upkeep and maintenance. The grassy and garden areas were still nice but could tell not as well maintained as in the past.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.negatives:

The putt-putt was a joke. There was more dirt, leaves, and pieces of branches on the course then on the ground surrounding the course. Either clean it up or shut it down.

A lot of construction next door , ( new water park, pools, renovation of other building/lobby-they say should be done by June) but work done while we were out for day and we knew about.
Unfortunately the Entrance to pier is a mess with construction, but once you’re on pier, all good.
Great little bait and snack shop, lots of fishing!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: I always love oceanfront properties but this resort tops it! Upon arrival I was greeted and promptly directed to check in. Checking in was a breeze! I was able to get a room on a higher floor upon request. A lot of things to do surrounding the hotel. It is right by the airport so if that sound of planes landing/taking off bothers you then I wouldn’t recommend. But other than that, I will plan to stay again.
reviews.negatives: I had to change my initial room due to a bug problem but when I called the front desk about it, there was no issue in changing rooms. The carpet did have stains on it and it is a little dated but hopefully with the renovations coming in the fall, this would be taken care of.

reviews.title: We had a very short great time!!
reviews.positives: Everything inside the room was great.  All of the Hilton Hotels items, like the towels and soap, shampoo, cream rinse were wonderful.  The bed was very comfortable!!  The staff in the Blue restaurant were amazing.  My husband cannot eat solid food so we asked if the Chef had a blender to use that would puree soup and she did!  It was such a nice thing to do, out of the ordinary!  Mary  was our dinner waitress.  We really appreciated that.  The waitress even went to get me ice cream from the area that you sell it!!  Our Breakfast waitress was so nice!!  she took very good care of us!!!  Thank you.  Her name was Katie. She was exceptional with all of the customers around us too!   she was by herself for a long time.  We would like for them to know how much we appreciated them!!
reviews.negatives: I know that you couldn't fix this, but we did not know that we were under the flight path for the airport!  We were worried that it was going to cause us sleeping issue but it stopped in time to sleep very well.  There was not anything on the phone in the room to call the front desk..  We had to go online and call that way.  There was nothing even on the brochure about where our room was, about calling the front desk. The only other issue was that my husband wasn't told that after a certain time of day, that you have to swipe the door card to have the elevator come down.

reviews.title: I am currently going to book for June again.
reviews.positives:
It’s beautiful and perfect 
On the beach ocean view with balcony is perfect 
I took two dogs. The play area for the dogs is fenced in.  
Dogs could be on the beach and the restaurant on the pier let my dogs sit outside with me.  Dogs can’t go on pier.  It’s too dangerous.  Lotta fishing with hooks everywhere! Not safe for them.  I hung out on the pier with the fisherman and woman. Saw fish and sharks.  Melvin the pier ambassador is amazing! Taught me how to fish.  Told great stories. Cleaned fish for people.  Hotel guests get to be on pier for free.  Everyone else 3.00.   It’s nice that way so it’s more private.  Loved the parking garage.  Feels safe.  Hotel is renovated and new.  Still doing construction. Adult pool open May 17.   Looks gorgeous tho.
reviews.negatives: There was nothing I didn’t like! The property was kept clean at all times.  Tom from maintenance was so helpful. Changed bags and put poop bags in dog pen.  Grass was cut short so easy to clean. Noah at the service desk was so welcoming.  Everyone was at the registration office. Two girls with long hair one brunette and one blonde. Exceptional service. Gave me water for me and my dogs for the trip.

reviews.negatives: The lazy river pools water looked pretty green. I'm not sure if it was supposed to be that color, but it wasn't welcoming, and I didn't get in. It was disappointing cause I love a lazy river.

reviews.negatives: There’s nothing that I don’t like about the property. Everything was great

reviews.title: Doubletree Fan!
reviews.positives:
This is my third stay at Doubletree. Everyone is welcoming! Excellent Service for rooms and all amenities! The beds are like sleeping on a cloud! 
Pools are clean and towels are available. Beach towels are also available. Was able to keep in touch with hotel staff by just texting what I needed. That was awesome!
The hotel is in close proximity to shopping and restaurants. Everyone I bring here absolutely loves it. Can't wait to book again!!

reviews.title: More than exceeded our expectations!
reviews.positives: We did not meet one member of staff who wasn't friendly, polite and accommodating and all went out of their way to make our stay as nice as possible.  Most importantly, they seemed so sincere!  The on-site restaurant was a nice surprise as the food was so delicious!  We spent a significant amount of money at the on-site restaurant and pool bar, as the atmosphere was so nice and tropical.  "Denise", who welcomed us upon check-in, set the stage for a wonderful time.  We really had no idea what to expect, however, our expectations were more than exceeded!  Oh, forgot to mention the nice clean room and view which overlooked the ocean and the lazy river pool.  The number of pools were very nice.  Although none of them were ever uncomfortably crowded, it was nice to have a choice of several after a long day on the beach.  And, for those who bring their pups (like us), there is a lot of green space for them to enjoy a walk with a nice ocean breeze, as well as a small dog park on site for taking care of business!
reviews.negatives: I hate to even mention that there is an airport that is close by and that the planes fly low, as so much is wonderful about the property, however, it is relevant as there are flyovers which are a bit noisy.  However, the location on a very pleasant and safe street definitely offsets this fact.

reviews.title: Great stay!!
reviews.positives: Loved everything about my stay! My 3 yr old son loved the food at the restaurant and I enjoyed the bar! It was classy and my mother enjoyed her stay as well. We will stay again very soon!! We didn't try to leave because the resort was perfect for our stay this time!! It was clean and that is what I really like. I will definitely stay again!
reviews.negatives: Parking! We were lucky enough to have a perfect parking spot right outside our building but we didn't want to leave and lose it because parking was nuts. Had we not gotten there when we did we would've had to park across the street and for 3 women's luggage and a 3yr olds that would've been very irritating.

reviews.title: Der Name Hilton täuscht!
reviews.positives: Die Lage ist sicher das beste…
reviews.negatives:
Die Anlage ist alt und lieblos und dafür zu teuer!
Die Pools öffnen erst ab 9 Uhr morgens, schwimmen vor dem Frühstück für uns Fahrer nicht möglich.

reviews.title: Zuweit weg vom Centrum
reviews.positives: Hotel war im grossen und ganzen gut. Jedoch das frühstück war endtäuschend. Am Sonntag war Buffett und am Montag a la Carte. Musste 20 minuten warten bis ich  Frühstücken konnte sodass ich am schluss darauf verzichtete wegen check out und weiterreise. Beim check out keine nachfrage ob es gefallen hatt.

reviews.title: Hotel und Zimmer ok, aber Baustelle, Fitnessraum außer Betrieb
reviews.positives: Parkplatz direkt beim Zimmer im selben Stock
reviews.negatives: Hotel wurde renoviert, Teilweise Baustelle, Fitnessraum war ohne Geräte, keine Info beim einchecken

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Расположение отеля, все очень компактно и уютно. Семейный спокойный отель

reviews.title: Очень всё понравилось!!
reviews.positives: Шикарный номер,вид из окна,вкусная еда в ресторане!

reviews.title: Ej prisvärt
reviews.positives:
Receptionen och baren var ganska trevlig.
Stora rum och sköna sängar
reviews.negatives: Slitet gammalt hotell som saknade det mesta som gör ett hotell mysigt.

reviews.title: I would not stay here again
reviews.positives: The bed was very comfortable and clean. Loved the water pressure and extra hot water. Staff was awesome and very friendly. Loved that the pier was right outside
reviews.negatives: We did not get the rooms that we booked. We only had a partial ocean view and this ugly area where they are digging something out. The elevators at te entrance to our area were down the entire trip. There were no balls for the mini golf, per my booking I should have paid 312.00 and we ended up over $400. Booking.com stated the pools would be back up but they were down, and yet we still had to pay a resort fee, for what? We had no pools, no hot tub, no golf and no elevators.

reviews.title: Staff was pleasant, but hotel needs an overhaul or rebranding.
reviews.positives: We had an ocean view with a king bed. Despite the condition of the hotel, the location of the hotel was very convenient.
reviews.negatives:
The condition of the hotel and grounds were beat up. We booked this through Priceline, thinking that it was a four star hotel. It was clearly not. Although the lobby was in good shape, the seating in the restaurant was completely worn through. The floors of the restaurant, showed tremendous where.

As far as our room was concerned… The plumbing above us, shuttered and ground with every usage. Our toilet leaked. The clock radio did not work. The fan in the bathroom made more noise than the adjacent airport. The hot water was not consistent nor manageable. The lighting on the balcony that led to our room was a bit scary according to my wife.

reviews.title: The bed was very comfy...everything else was standard in comparison to other less expensive hotels
reviews.positives: For some strange reason i was expecting a fancier room. Instead i got a mediocre room with a ripping carpet,  dusty lamp shade and someone’s hair stuck to side of the toilet. But maybe I'm tripping...idk I think we're only paying for the convenience of being on the beach and possibly the brand.
reviews.negatives: Stained and ripped carpet,  needs to be replaced for the amount of money customers pay for a stay.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: I loved the ocean room was clean and pet friendly
reviews.negatives:
Had to evaluate in the night never was told what happened 
 the TV did not work in other room.When we got there my key would not work had to put something new in it.Went to breakfast ate and had to pay way to much but were told when we checked.in we had the breakfast paid for.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The registration staff was very helpful, and helped get two connected rooms that met our needs.
reviews.negatives: The floor elevator area was hard to get in and out of with the heavy push open door. The walkways were wet and looked slippery. The room door was also very heavy to open.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Pancakes were blah, syrup seemed watered down, everything was pretty average. Didn’t like the selling, trying to sell Hilton awards properties. Only one elevator

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Staff super friendly and responsive. Loved the pier.
reviews.negatives: The a/c cutting on and off. Rates are high. Not really within walking distance of shops and restaurants.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Everything was nice 🤌
We like view from the window

reviews.title: Excellent - we will be back -  food was great - we ate both breakfast and dinner
reviews.positives: The room was clean and beds were comfortable.   View was excellent. Accommodations for our dog was greatly appreciated.
reviews.negatives: maybe a skyway to the main lobby for a more direct route; also when we arrived, it was a bit confusing on where to go to enter main lobby.  Better signage maybe?
